goal_text: Task 10269: You are looking for a restaurant in the west part of town and it should serve canapes food. If there is no such venue how about thai type of food. Make sure you get the address, phone number, and price range of the venue.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
